_comment: ElevenLabs Conversational AI Server Tools for Olive. Replace ${BASE_URL} with your ngrok URL in the EL dashboard. No auth — backend trusts the tunnel.

tools.name: get_menu
tools.description: Fetch the current in-stock menu (compact: id, name, price, category, spice options, veg flag, short description). Call this ONCE at the very start of the call, AGAIN whenever the caller has paused more than ~60 seconds, AND any time you suspect the menu changed. This is your source of truth — never name a dish that isn't in the latest response.

tools.name: get_item_details
tools.description: Fetch full details for one item: description, ingredients, allergens, prep_minutes, all spice levels, dietary flags. Call when the caller asks about ingredients ('what's in the X?'), allergens ('does it have nuts?'), spice options, or prep time.

path_parameters.name: id
path_parameters.description: Item id from get_menu or search_menu.

tools.name: search_menu
tools.description: Fuzzy search the menu by name/description. Use when the caller says something close-but-not-exact ('biriyani', 'tikka thing'). Returns up to 5 ranked matches. If 0 matches: it's not on the menu — do NOT invent. If >1: ask which one.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Open a new empty order for this call. Call EXACTLY ONCE per call, the first time the caller wants to actually order something. Returns the order id — reuse for every later add_item / update_item / remove_item / get_order / submit_order.

body_parameters.name: conversation_id
body_parameters.description: Wire to ElevenLabs system dynamic variable 'system__conversation_id'. NOT LLM-provided.

body_parameters.name: customer_phone
body_parameters.description: Wire to 'system__caller_id' if available; otherwise omit.

tools.name: add_item
tools.description: Add ONE line to the order. Call for each distinct item. Gather modifiers (spice level, no_onions, no_garlic, extras) BEFORE calling. On 409 item_out_of_stock: apologize, offer alternative from latest menu. On 400 invalid_modifier: drop the bad modifier, ask for a valid one.

tools.name: update_item
tools.description: Change quantity / modifiers / notes on an existing line. Use for 'make that medium spice' or 'change to two of those'.

tools.name: remove_item
tools.description: Remove a line. Use for 'actually scratch the naan' or 'never mind the lassi'.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Fetch the current full order state (all lines, total). Call this BEFORE every read-back to the caller so you read accurate state, not what you remember.

tools.name: submit_order
tools.description: Finalize the order and send to the kitchen. Call AFTER the caller has confirmed the read-back. Returns order_number (read this back), total_cents, eta_minutes. After this, no more line edits — order is locked.

body_parameters.name: customer_name
body_parameters.description: Ask 'Can I get a name for the order?' first.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel the whole order. Use ONLY when the caller explicitly says 'never mind' / 'cancel the whole thing'. Use remove_item for single items. After cancelling, thank the caller and end the call.
